description: Clean the GPS survey data from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fells_survey_points.gpx' in Garmin BaseCamp by removing the erroneous waypoints starting with 'ERR_' ('ERR_Canopy_Glitch', 'ERR_Signal_Bounce', 'ERR_Cold_Start') and preserving the valid survey waypoints ('Survey_Start', 'Survey_End', 'Junction_North', 'Junction_South'). Export the cleaned survey data to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\cleaned_survey.gpx'.
